supported: On KuaiSearch Lite, task-adapted HSTU, matched SASRec, and the independently implemented LLM-SRec mechanism all produce broad candidate-relative history response while strict-nonrepeat response direction remains statistically compatible with chance and ranking utility remains unstable. This is consistent with the ordinary Qwen and BGE full-token observation.
not_supported: HSTU, SASRec, or LLM-SRec is already an adequate paper-level baseline on query-conditioned product search.
The shared pattern is a universal Transformer limitation.
LLM-SRec has been numerically reproduced under its original Amazon next-item setting.
A new architecture is authorized by these Lite results.

hstu.boundary: official HSTU core at 6135bc30398f97e5786674192558d91f2ef2fa90 plus shared PPS adapter

sasrec_matched.boundary: official same-tree SASRec core with the identical PPS adapter and budget

llm_srec.boundary: independent paper-mechanism implementation; frozen Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B plus frozen train-only SASRec teacher; PPS query/fixed-slate adaptation

interpretation.positive: The original Lite symptom is not confined to encoder versus decoder full-token serialization: three sequence-oriented implementations also react broadly without reliable strict-nonrepeat direction.
interpretation.limitation: Because the task-adapted HSTU/SASRec query-candidate base is below BM25 and LLM-SRec is not yet normally tuned in its origin-compatible data regime, they cannot currently bind a negative shared-failure claim.
interpretation.hstu_vs_sasrec: The matched SASRec control shows that the first sequence result is not uniquely caused by HSTU's transduction unit; the outer search adaptation, supervision, data, or generic sequence-to-slate interface remains a live cause.
interpretation.llm_srec: One full Lite epoch of explicit sequence distillation does not remove the symptom, but this is a reason to continue adequacy work, not evidence that the published method fails generally.

next_actions: Build a stronger shared query-candidate task adapter or ordinary sequential pretraining recipe so HSTU-QC is at least competitive with the strong base control.
Run LLM-SRec first on Amazon-C4, its rich-text and source-compatible boundary, with a bounded normal training budget.
Repeat adequate survivors on a second seed before any representative-family claim.
Move the adequate recipes to KuaiSearch Full when Full preparation is complete.
